title: Generico Tractor Toy Farm Toy Farm Toy, Assorted Colours
features: Friction Toy Tractor - Farm Tractor for Children: The toy tractor is the ideal companion for children who love the world of agricultural vehicles. With a length of 21 cm, this clutch tractor is designed to provide a realistic and immersive gaming experience. Easy to use, just pull it back and the tractor will start moving independently, stimulating motor coordination and fun.

Clutch Tractor Toy - Without Trailer, Compact Design: This agricultural tractor is a sturdy and versatile vehicle, perfect for children who want to explore the world of the farm. Without a trailer, the tractor has a compact and simple design, ideal for the little ones. The friction movement allows for a long playing time without the need for batteries, promoting active play and learning through action.

Toy Farm Tractor - Great for Role Play and Imagination: The toy tractor is perfect for role play that simulate farm activities, helping children develop social and cognitive skills. Kids can use the tractor to transport hay, farmland and simulate farm work, stimulating their creativity and problem-solving skills.

DURABLE DESIGN AND ASSORTED COLORS: Each tractor is made of sturdy and durable materials, designed to withstand the stresses of everyday play. Available in assorted colours and sold in random color, the tractor will play with the colors that will attract children's attention, making each game a unique and fun experience.

Large tractor - ideal for children from 3 years: With a length of 21 cm, the tractor is perfect for children aged 3 and up. Its size is suitable for easy handling by small hands, promoting independent play. It is also an ideal game for learning fine and coarse motor skills.

Educational and Fun Toy for All Kids: The friction tractor is an educational toy that helps children understand the operation of vehicles and explore the world of the farm. Stimulates imaginative play and allows children to develop hand-eye coordination skills, stimulating natural curiosity and playful learning.
